steps.title: Use plural lawmakers
steps.content: The sentence needs a plural subject for the verb designated: Missouri lawmakers. It also needs the possessive state's because the official fossil belongs to the state of Missouri.

steps.title: Reject apostrophe errors
steps.content: Choice A uses lawmaker's as a possessive and states as a plain plural. Choice C uses lawmaker's as a possessive instead of a subject noun. Choice D uses states without the possessive apostrophe. The answer is B.
